craigslist.title: Call Today for Exclusive Monthly Specials - No Lease, No Deposit!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Monthly Price, Plus Tax No Lease, No Deposit, No Problem! Welcome to the Best Value in Extended-Stay Accommodations! With our all-inclusive pricing, you can pay weekly or monthly and save hundreds of dollars every month. Enjoy the convenience of no lease, no deposit, and no credit check for a hassle-free move-in experience. Your Safety is Our Priority: Our dedicated staff is on-site 24/7, and the property is key-controlled for your peace of mind. FREE Amenities Include: Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat Secure property with key-controlled access Dog friendly - We love your fur babies! Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly Under-bed storage for extra space and organizatio Take a tour to see why we are different and better! Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals No Lease - Check out on your schedule Free Wi-Fi & Cable No Deposit - Check-in any time Various Studio Layouts; Choose what's right for you! 24/7 vending machines with snacks and drinks All our rooms come with fully equipped kitchens, featuring dual stove-top burners, microwaves, full-size sinks, and refrigerators, so you can save even more on dining! Enjoy the convenience of on-site laundry available 24/7. We are also pet-friendly, welcoming up to two dogs under 50 lbs (pet fee applies). Book Your Stay Today! Experience the best value in Sonesta Westlake Cleveland! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: show contact info Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information. Extra charge for additional beds.
